panels.title: 🎵 Magical Songs
panels.infobox:
Summon songs the Bard learns and can upgrade. Stats shown are Base / Upgraded.

⚠️ = MISSABLE — upgrade source is tied to a one-time event or choice

entry_Tune.name: Thunder Spider
entry_Tune.special: Lightning stuns opponents; upgraded chains bolts between enemies
entry_Tune.obtain: Taught by old man in Drunken Rat cellar (start of game)
entry_Tune.obtain_upg: Stump chest on Level 1, Forest Tower

entry_Tune.name: Common Rat / Vorpal Rat
entry_Tune.special: Rat: none. Vorpal: launches at foes from great distance. Also scares people in pubs.
entry_Tune.obtain: Bard begins game knowing this song
entry_Tune.obtain_upg: Tree trunk just before NW passage to watery area, Highland Park

entry_Tune.name: Heroine
entry_Tune.obtain: Bannafeet teaches you after freeing Ketill Swart (or later in Neversdale hideout)
entry_Tune.obtain_upg: Chest behind NW secret door in Chicken Portal level, MacRath's Dungeon

entry_Tune.name: Crone
entry_Tune.special: Heals injured allies; upgraded also curses enemies with fear
entry_Tune.obtain_upg: Chest in Dounby Old City Tunnels

entry_Tune.name: Bodyguard
entry_Tune.special: Taunts ranged foes; upgraded absorbs magic (immune to magical attacks)
entry_Tune.obtain: Chest in poorly lit storeroom (single-door hill), Kirkwall
entry_Tune.obtain_upg: From Olav after acquiring Firbolg Armbands in Finfolk Caverns

entry_Tune.name: Light Fairy
entry_Tune.special: Lights dark areas; stuns/blinds enemies in combat
entry_Tune.obtain: Taught by four Bodbs in Kirkwall (Ch. III)
entry_Tune.obtain_upg: Corpse on Level 1, Mountain Tower (NE side room)

entry_Tune.name: Mercenary
entry_Tune.special: Flails axe, knocking foes to ground
entry_Tune.obtain: Mell teaches you after defeating Fnarf in Highland Park
entry_Tune.obtain_upg: Chest in obviously-trapped chest, Mountain Pass

entry_Tune.name: Trap Finder
entry_Tune.special: Disarms traps and picks up loot; upgraded also opens secret doors
entry_Tune.obtain: Stump chest on Level 1, Forest Tower
entry_Tune.obtain_upg: Obtained by defeating Lugh (Ch. VII) — given with Knight song

entry_Tune.name: Elemental
entry_Tune.special: Throws fireballs burning foes in area; can melt ice walls
entry_Tune.obtain: Taught by Valkyrie after helping Hrafn in Burial Chamber
entry_Tune.obtain_upg: Be nice to Trow on docks in Stromness

entry_Tune.name: Knight
entry_Tune.obtain_upg: Chest behind NE secret door in Chicken Portal level, MacRath's Dungeon

entry_Tune.name: Brute
entry_Tune.obtain: Chest in Dounby Old City Tunnels
entry_Tune.obtain_upg: Buy Ancient Flute from Crazy Thorvald in Stromness — comes free with purchase

entry_Tune.name: Knocker
entry_Tune.special: Uses charged lightning rods to attack multiple enemies
entry_Tune.obtain: Obtained from Renard Brothers after their deception (SQ4: Fox Brothers)
entry_Tune.obtain_upg: Chest west of Obligatory Lava Level entrance, Finfolk Caverns

entry_Tune.name: Rogue
entry_Tune.special: Taunts melee foes, evades and counterattacks; upgraded daggers are poisoned

entry_Tune.name: Health Stealer (Gouger)
entry_Tune.special: Drains enemy health, uses it to heal allies
entry_Tune.obtain_upg: Be snarky to Trow by Kirk in Stromness

entry_Tune.name: Behemoth
entry_Tune.special: Charges causing explosion; fiery breath in close quarters
entry_Tune.obtain: Chest in center of Sun Portal level, MacRath's Dungeon
entry_Tune.obtain_upg: Be snarky to the Chosen in Obligatory Lava Level (SA8)

entry_Tune.name: Enchantress
entry_Tune.special: Revives dead allies; upgraded also slows foes
entry_Tune.obtain: After lighting torches in Moon Portal level, MacRath's Dungeon
